notes: Chunk 55 (Template E, Tier B) complete 2026-06-15. 25 new routes: Caucasus/Central Asia to EEA/Nordic/Ireland (16 routes: AM/GE/AZ/KZ to NO/DK/FI/IE) + Baltic/Slovenia to EU (9 routes: EE/LV/LT to BE/IT/ES, LT to BE/IT, SI to BE). Blog Day 21: pet-transport-uk-to-new-zealand (Marcus Webb, ~2200 words, MPI import permit, RNATT titre 90-day minimum, 10-day quarantine Auckland/Christchurch, Emirates/Singapore Airlines cargo, GBP 4,800-7,200). Next: Chunk 56 (Template A, Tier B). Day 22 next.

counts.note: total_site_pages counts content .md source files. The full deployed total (including Hugo taxonomy and list pages) is verified from sitemap.xml after a build.

counts_method: Reconciled from disk by verify_build_state.py. Never hand-edit count fields; run 'python verify_build_state.py --write' instead.
